title: Files, Paths, CSV, JSON, and Data Boundaries · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: Import, validate, transform, and safely publish local nonprofit program data. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a repeatable data-quality reporting pipeline and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use pathlib to compose, inspect, resolve, traverse, and constrain filesystem paths portably.
Open text or binary files with explicit mode, encoding, newline, and context-managed lifetime.
Process large files incrementally and choose whole-file reads only when bounded size and simplicity justify them.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
